title: westringia lurida
intro: Westringia lurida, also known as the coastal rosemary or blue mountain rosemary, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to Australia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Westringia lurida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes, and it is also used as a natural insect repellent and in traditional medicine.
